author: Marizuk Mustapha
review: Always having challenges when it comes to recharge. Payment will be successful but will not get value of what I paid for. This has been repeating itself for couple of times. That I end up getting my airtime after almost two weeks. It is high time I uninstall this app. Inefficient and unreliable at all. I'll never ever use this app again even if this is the only option to recharge I had stop using MTN. Very disappointing. It's 27 days still not get my airtime.

author: Ruby Chimgarum Dike
review: This new update is frustrating. I have been trying to login to the app since yesterday, and it's been impossible. I uninstalled and installed the app again, and it's the same thing. This update just made things very bad, this was not my experience before this update, and now everything is just frustrating and annoying.

author: Gift
review: first of all, this mtn is very annoying, how will unknown numbers be sending and transferring data through my own number, I called mtn and did exactly what I was asked to do, updated the app and did the security settings, when I go to put pin, I will click and click but the boxes are unresponsive, someone can't even set pin because of that, so I tried to use otp, but the unknown numbers are still able to do as they like, what's the point of the security settings then.

author: david oshiorenoya
review: The MTN app is a convenient tool for managing mobile services, offering features like data purchase, airtime recharge, and balance checks in one place. Its interface is fairly user-friendly, though it can sometimes lag or crash during use. Transactions are usually fast, but occasional network issues may affect performance. Overall, it’s useful but could improve in speed and stabilit

author: shadrach john
review: Every updated version becomes worse than the previous one. I still have to struggle to keep refreshing the app whenever I login. Most times it doesn't even refresh. There's a lot of glitches in this app that I can't mention.

author: Albert Lotanna
review: Very useless and buggy app. Nothing clicks expect you press them 30 times and hope they click, nonsense app! From poor network, to good but unstable network. I'm sick of you all. I wish Nigeria had more network competitors. Someone will eat your cake for launch. update: this issue has been fixed, the app responds when stuff is clicked. Great improvement.

author: LEOMARK ONYEBUCHI
review: A cool App for monitoring network usage and service with MTN Nigeria communications. Though my experience with this app isn't cool. Seven (7) months now I can't use gesture mode (Phone navigation) to use the app. Only tap (button) is feasible. Most of the time for me to leave the App, I have to do that through notification to another App.

author: Hauwa Muhammad Sani
review: this app is so useless in terms of subscriptions all they care is to debit money of my balance. I don't know how manage I subscribed for izeplay they call it for months now I can not unsubscribe it with many attempts but failed. after they have accepted my request of cancellation but still they refuse to take it off my dashboard and still deducting 300 weekly out of my balance. I hate this ignorance

author: SUCCESS OPARA
review: Ever since the app updated itself yesterday, the app doesn't let me login anymore. Error message is either my phone number is wrong or the OTP sent to me is wrong, before it goes ahead to say login is unavailable at that time. This inconvenience has now made it that I cannot login to make data & airtime purchases or even renew the FiberX subscription. UPDATE — 11 Mar 2026! For over a month now, the team has not yet responded to my email or done anything about my access to the app.

author: abdullahi abdulrahim
review: MTN now has a dubious/tricky/ way of deducting ones money or even offering credit when you never requested for it. When you want to buy a certain amount of data, they will forced options you never requested for on you through some program options and will put your real option at number 2 instead of 1 and if your credit is not up to the amount they will force debt credit on you. This is manipulation of the highest order. Nigeria Minister of communication should santion them on this.

author: Adeleke Naomi
review: I have been trying to login into the app for the past 3 Weeks now it's not going . The app is so frustrating, anytime I buy a lesser data today, the next day it has skyrocket to a bigger bundle that is more frustrating to buy. why is the app not functioning at all, due to the poor network and not being able to login into the app my Mom has uninstalled the app from her phone.

author: KC ADENIYI
review: its does the job most of the time but it really annoying that I have to login for scratch every time I want to use it please fix that and it's really slow sometimes. This app keeps getting worse I bought data two days In a row I was debited and I didn't receive any data, the costumer service is trash they won't even attend to you pls refund my money what the hell is this if I could rate zero stars I would because that what this app deserves

author: Mbaebie Goodluck
review: the reason why I rate this app with just a star is because I don't like the way they always send Otp before I could login the SIM is my mifi so i must always look for a phone to put the SIM before I can login again I pray they fix this issue. You are talking about signing in with biometrics not all phones have biometrics so what are we supposed to Do?

author: Asii Pius
review: MTN app on its own is good but buying things online like mifi is a disaster, imagine ordering mifi online taking more than 3 weeks and still not seen it. Previously, I ordered for a router and it came with a bad/unusable SIM that can't be registered, even with a bad battery that manages to carry me for 13hrs. I thought I was dealing with a communication giant but reality taught me that am dealing with under bridge Oshodi boys. At this point, am will to forget the mifi that has taking forever.

author: Stacey Evans
review: I'm having issue in sharing airtime because I accidentally purchased card of #9000 when I was supposed to send the money to someone so I've trying to reach out to their customer service but they keeping on telling me they can't resolve the issue so I think u guys have to work on that because I actually need retrieve my money back 😡😡😡

author: Femi
review: The app is so unreliable like updates are not tested before being pushed. In the latest update, I have been able to add my Fiber ID, but now I can't view data balance or credit of my other numbers. Only the fiber is showing.

author: Funmilola Oluwo
review: I don't see the use of this app as an easier medium.I can't even manage my subscriptions because it says "We're unable to process your request" everytime I try to cancel the auto-renewal subsciptions I didn't even suscribe for,mind you I try it every single day. This problem also occurs in Mtn telephone services.Why give us the option of "auto-renewal" when we can't cancel.I lose money everyday because of this.If this is a bug in the app please fix it, i feel like I got scammed .

author: Elyna Ejiogu O.
review: I got very suspicious with the way my data was finishing so I bought a 1gb plan and set a data limit of that 1gb....why did my limit reach in less than 30min??! No, I was not doing anything to drain it, I was on TWITTER MY GOD!! MTN what is the meaning of this? Why is my data running down so fast?! Are you really ripping us Nigerians off? I am so disappointed that the rumours are true. You've already increased the prices the least you could do is let the data last. You're better than this.

author: Praise Elenwo
review: After everything,you people have not changed at all. Still lots of network issues with my sim plus signing in is hell on earth. It's so annoying and I hate this all. Absolute garbage,bad and unfair bundles,crazy deals and in general a very slow working app. Don't waste your data. If there was a zero star I'll give it that

author: Olakunle Olayinka (El'Shazzar)
review: EDIT. This app UI is good. But UX is has a long way to go. I believe you have reduced the need for the OTP. The app is also faster. Thank you so much. Next increase people's ability to share their data or airtime. Or remove the inhibition outrightly. Do that, and you have a 5-star app.

author: Maazi Chike
review: This app was working until I was forced to update... Now I can't even sign in. What's going on??? Edit: I'll still leave it at 1 star. Your network has been terrible ever since you made a mtn Nigeria's comment about shedding services in areas with low profit/rural areas. Even after tariff increase, it keeps getting worse. On top of that, one can't reach your agent via your customer care number, which I believe is deliberate

author: Clancy Bush
review: Now good. Before I said "If you people don't want to have a mobile app again, you should tell us, please, so that we can uninstall it. Why should one develop hypertension while attempting to access the myMTN app? The former app was ok, until this new one that often lags and most times fail to open/connect."

author: Halima Yakubu
review: Frustrating app! I'm editing my review from 2 years ago. Now the app is poor in a different way. I haven't been able to login, not through biometrics, nor Google sign nor OTP. I keep getting a 'network error'.

author: God'swill Bawa G_Keyz
review: For the fact that MyMTN app is 105MB is very irrelevant. Large in size, slow in performance & completely annoying when trying to access its features. It takes the whole day loading information and at the end one might not find anything interesting. please do better.

author: Nmesoma Uzomah
review: I use this app to monitor how much data and airtime my younger siblings have and use it for business. Why on earth will the app be logging me out, and start removing every number?! Even those for my business, every time I manage to log in, all the numbers on my dashboard will be removed and I have to reverify them. EVERY SINGLE TIME!

author: Adebisi Oluwatimileyin Samson
review: The app is really annoying these days, from renewing subscription to changing theme and appearance to having challenges in login into the app, it's really frustrating. I even had to uninstall and reinstall it. And I urge you guys who wants to update not to because, it just gets worse. This app just keeps getting worse.

author: Ayodele Tijesuse
review: OTP drops faster now. Well done but for MTN FIBRE X, subscribers are complaining that they can't change their passwords on the App, neither can they stop the usage whenever they travel or not using the service (they want a stop& continue option like a few of our competitors) and complaints of including a power bank like Airtel.

author: Chukwudumeme Ejike-Anyaduba
review: It's a nice idea, but considering the reputation MTN has in Nigeria, this app is a very poor representation of what MTN claims to be. Uncountable bugs, at first I thought it was a device compatibility thing, but I've tested this across 4 different devices and they are all terrible. Please work on your app and make it more usable.

author: Nonso Nd
review: Good app. like the update that now shows Fibre X details on the main page. A possible update would be to allow the adding of multiple Fibre X plans to Thier account. Currently, I have to delete one before adding another. Blessings

author: Haphyz Gbenle
review: I am currently unable to add another no. on myMTN ng app , i dont know if there is a place to formally make this complaint that's why i am coming here , pls help to look into it whenever i click on proceed it returns an error saying " sorry , system is temporarily unable to process your request , pls try after sometine"

author: Arinze Egwu
review: Tap on a clip to paste it in the text box.ABC5. Save & manage payment cards users can now save and manage their payment cards to enjoy a hassle-free payment experience, no need to enter your card details every other time.

author: Essien Nwanyo
review: MTN, you guys just make life easy. With the 'Manage Multiple Numbers' feature, I can see the Aritime and Data balances of ALL my MTN numbers and assets in one view on the App. Wow! Excellent stuff. You deserve a 10 Star 🌟

author: Iannah David
review: it's extremely difficult to switch between accounts, I had to log out of my first account to switch to the other account, and now I'm trying to buy a data bundle but it's giving me issues, saying I should try again later. Honestly you guys should do better

author: Owolabi Kezia
review: sometimes this app will just refuse to work. since I installed this app, it has not been able to capture my bio metric, most of the time, I can't log in because it says "no network" but the network is fine on other apps

author: Desmond Arthur
review: the app does not remember log in. I have to re-register, and signi in with otp every time I want to use the app, even though I have biometrics enabled. Terrible experience and a big shame to MTN who is supposedly the biggest telecom in Nigeria. SMH

author: Joshua Sky
review: I really don't like how the network fluctuates......this morning I was trying to share data sorry since 3 days now I've been. trying but will be telling me I don't have enough data to share like how.......even the calling aspect everything's just bad now eve. to ussd applications.......its just wonderful isn't it?

author: Chidi Wilson
review: I have been unable to login to the app for a month plus now, the OTP pin never comes in, the network is most times treble 24/7 like they're shaking the mast. Normally in life it goes from grass to grace, but you guys are the opposite.

author: Kayode Balogun
review: If there was zero star, I would have chosen that, this app is totally useless... it only opens like once in two month, and when it does, it's still pure nonsense. I only use it for viewing my balance, and that it couldn't even do...

author: Praise Obiorah
review: zero stars from me, very terrible , stay away from MTN if you don't want to loose your money, I paid back my debt only to find out it appeared back the next day, thinking maybe it was a glitch I went back to my cash app to find out I was debited a very long time ago, I tried contacting them but the network never came on, they are very terrible and I must change to a new sim. God will judge them

author: Chinonso Igwe
review: MTN should try and work on their data usage history on the app because it always gives false information and sometimes it will show me 0.0 Bytes for a full day, which is very impossible because my data connection is always on and I'm always active on the internet. pls work on this
